name: Pricing Strategy Simulator
persona: A Growth PM or founder at a 20–300 person SaaS company running a pricing review without a dedicated pricing analyst and needing an explainable segment-by-segment tradeoff model
problem_statement: In pricing reviews, teams change tiers and prices without a shared model of segment conversion impact, leading to decisions that feel right but later harm adoption or revenue
artifact_type: single-page web app with a strategy builder, live simulation charts, and A/B comparison mode
